title: Session Management
subtitle: The left pane lists sessions, and the right pane shows the selected session's messages, audit trail, summaries, and runtime state.

confirmClearHistoryBatch.title: Clear history for selected sessions?
confirmClearHistoryBatch.message: Clear the stored message history, summaries, workflow records, and runtime context for {count} selected sessions? This cannot be undone.

confirmClearHistory.title: Clear session history?
confirmClearHistory.message: Clear the stored message history, summaries, workflow records, and runtime context for session "{name}" while keeping the session itself? This cannot be undone.

confirmClearAuditBatch.title: Clear audit logs for selected sessions?
confirmClearAuditBatch.message: Clear the audit log entries for {count} selected sessions while keeping the sessions and message history?

confirmClearAudit.title: Clear audit logs?
confirmClearAudit.message: Clear the audit log entries for session "{name}" while keeping the session and message history?

confirmDeleteBatch.title: Delete selected sessions?
confirmDeleteBatch.message: Delete {count} selected sessions and their stored history, audit logs, and runtime state? This cannot be undone.

confirmDelete.title: Delete session?
confirmDelete.message: Delete session "{name}" and its stored history, audit logs, and runtime state? This cannot be undone.

empty.title: No session data
empty.subtitle: There are no sessions to display right now.

messages.loadFailed: Failed to load session management data
messages.historyBatchClearFailed: Failed to clear history for selected sessions
messages.auditBatchClearFailed: Failed to clear audit logs for selected sessions
